clinic.name: MedVita Clinic
clinic.description: MedVita Clinic has been delivering world-class medical care since 2005. Our team of board-certified specialists combines advanced technology with compassionate service.

hero.headline: Your Health, Our Mission
hero.subheadline: World-class specialists. Same-day appointments. Transparent pricing.

about.headline: Redefining Modern Healthcare
about.body:
Founded in 2005, MedVita Clinic has grown into the Bay Area's most trusted multi-specialty practice. We believe exceptional care means blending the latest clinical evidence with genuine human connection. Every patient is a partner—in their diagnosis, treatment plan, and long-term wellness.

Our state-of-the-art facility spans 18,000 sq ft and houses advanced diagnostic imaging, an on-site lab, and private consultation suites. We're committed to zero surprise billing and to answering your questions before you even ask them.
about.mission: To make excellent, evidence-based healthcare accessible, transparent, and patient-centered.

values.title: Compassion
values.body: Every patient deserves dignity, respect, and a listening ear.

values.title: Integrity
values.body: We are transparent about diagnoses, options, and costs—always.

values.title: Excellence
values.body: Board-certified specialists committed to continuous improvement.

values.title: Community
values.body: Proudly serving the Bay Area with free health-education events.

timeline.event: MedVita opens its doors in the Financial District.
Expanded to a full multi-specialty campus.
Launched digital patient records and telehealth.
Covid response — stood up drive-through testing in 72 hours.
Opened new Wellness Center and Preventive Health wing.

services.title: General Medicine
services.short_description: Comprehensive primary care for all ages, from annual check-ups to chronic disease management.
services.description: Our General Medicine department is your first point of contact for all health concerns. From routine physicals and vaccinations to managing hypertension, diabetes, and respiratory conditions, our internists deliver thorough, evidence-based care with a personal touch.

services.title: Cardiology
services.short_description: Advanced heart care including diagnostics, interventional procedures, and cardiac rehabilitation.
services.description: Our Cardiology team specialises in the full spectrum of heart disease—from stress testing and echocardiography to complex interventional procedures. We focus on prevention first, helping you reduce risk factors before they become life-threatening events.

services.title: Dermatology
services.short_description: Medical and cosmetic dermatology for skin, hair, and nail conditions at every life stage.
services.description: Our board-certified dermatologists diagnose and treat over 3,000 skin conditions, from acne and eczema to melanoma and psoriasis. We also offer cosmetic procedures including laser therapy, chemical peels, and injectable treatments in a medical-grade environment.

services.title: Pediatrics
services.short_description: Compassionate, child-friendly care from newborns through adolescence.
services.description: Our pediatric team creates a warm, welcoming environment where children feel safe and parents feel heard. Services include well-child visits, immunisations, ADHD management, asthma care, and adolescent health counselling.

services.title: Orthopedics
services.short_description: Expert care for bones, joints, muscles, and sports injuries—surgical and non-surgical.
services.description: From fracture management and joint replacement consultations to sports medicine and physical therapy coordination, our orthopedic surgeons and physiatrists take a conservative-first approach to getting you back to full function.

services.title: Mental Health
services.short_description: Evidence-based therapy, psychiatric evaluation, and medication management in a safe space.
services.description: Our licensed therapists and psychiatrists offer individual therapy, couples counselling, and psychiatric services for anxiety, depression, PTSD, and other conditions. Telehealth options ensure you can access support wherever you are.

services.title: Radiology & Imaging
services.short_description: On-site X-ray, MRI, CT scan, and ultrasound with rapid turnaround reports.
services.description: Our in-house imaging suite means you don't need to travel across town for diagnostics. Board-certified radiologists interpret results typically within 24 hours, with urgent reads available same-day.

services.title: Women's Health
services.short_description: Comprehensive OB/GYN care covering reproductive health, pregnancy, and menopause.
services.description: Our women's health specialists provide full-spectrum care: annual well-woman exams, contraception counselling, prenatal care, high-risk pregnancy management, fertility consultations, and menopause support.

departments.name: Primary Care
departments.description: Your healthcare home base — comprehensive care for the whole family.

departments.name: Cardiovascular Center
departments.description: State-of-the-art cardiac diagnostics and interventional care.

departments.name: Orthopedic & Sports Medicine
departments.description: Restoring mobility and performance for patients of all ages.

departments.name: Behavioral Health
departments.description: Compassionate mental health support in a confidential setting.

departments.name: Radiology & Diagnostics
departments.description: Cutting-edge imaging with same-day and next-day results.

departments.name: Dermatology & Aesthetics
departments.description: Medical and cosmetic skin expertise in a spa-like environment.

departments.name: Women's Health
departments.description: Holistic care through every chapter of a woman's life.

doctors.name: Dr. Sarah Chen
doctors.title: MD, FACP
doctors.bio: Dr. Chen is a board-certified internist who trained at UCSF and brings 15 years of experience in complex chronic disease management. She is passionate about building long-term patient relationships and believes preventive care is the foundation of health.

doctors.name: Dr. Marcus Williams
doctors.title: MD, FACC
doctors.bio: Dr. Williams is a fellowship-trained cardiologist specialising in non-invasive imaging and preventive cardiology. He has published over 30 peer-reviewed articles and is a lead investigator in the HEART-PRO clinical trial.
education: MD – Johns Hopkins University School of Medicine

doctors.name: Dr. Priya Patel
doctors.title: MD, FAAD
doctors.bio: Dr. Patel is a double board-certified dermatologist in medical, surgical, and cosmetic dermatology. Known for her meticulous technique and aesthetic eye, she has helped thousands achieve healthier skin with minimal downtime.
education: MD – University of Pennsylvania Perelman School of Medicine

doctors.name: Dr. James O'Connor
doctors.title: MD, FAAP
doctors.bio: Dr. O'Connor has dedicated his career to children's health, with special expertise in developmental paediatrics and adolescent medicine. His friendly, patient approach puts even the most anxious children at ease.
education: MD – University of Michigan Medical School
Board Certified – American Board of Pediatrics

doctors.name: Dr. Aisha Okafor
doctors.title: MD, FAAOS
doctors.bio: Dr. Okafor is a fellowship-trained orthopedic surgeon with expertise in arthroscopic surgery and joint preservation. Team physician for two professional Bay Area sports teams, she brings elite athletic performance recovery techniques to everyday patients.
education: Residency – Hospital for Special Surgery, New York
Fellowship – Steadman Clinic, Vail CO (Sports Medicine)

doctors.name: Dr. Elena Vasquez
doctors.title: MD, PhD
doctors.bio: Dr. Vasquez holds a dual MD/PhD and is a leading researcher in cognitive-behavioural interventions for treatment-resistant depression. She creates tailored, medication-assisted therapy plans and is a fierce advocate for destigmatising mental health care.

doctors.name: Dr. David Kim
doctors.title: MD, FACR
doctors.bio: Dr. Kim is a fellowship-trained body imager with special expertise in cardiac and musculoskeletal MRI. He is committed to clear, jargon-free reports and direct communication with referring physicians and patients.
education: MD – Stanford University School of Medicine

doctors.name: Dr. Nadia Laurent
doctors.title: MD, FACOG
doctors.bio: Dr. Laurent is a compassionate OB/GYN with expertise in minimally invasive gynecologic surgery and high-risk obstetrics. She is devoted to empowering women with the information they need to make confident health decisions.

testimonials.name: Rebecca M.
testimonials.body: Dr. Williams caught an arrhythmia that two other cardiologists had missed. His thoroughness and the way he explained everything—without talking down to me—gave me complete confidence. My heart is literally in better hands.

testimonials.name: Carlos R.
testimonials.body: Six months after a ACL reconstruction with Dr. Okafor, I ran my first half marathon. The care from surgery through physical therapy was seamless. The entire team celebrated with me at the finish line—virtually, of course!

testimonials.name: Sophie T.
testimonials.body: I struggled with cystic acne for a decade. After one consultation with Dr. Patel, I had a clear treatment roadmap. Within 4 months my skin had transformed. I wish I had come here sooner.

testimonials.name: Michael J.
testimonials.body: MedVita is exactly what healthcare should look like. My appointment started on time, Dr. Chen spent 35 full minutes with me, and I received my lab results the very next morning via the patient portal. Outstanding.

testimonials.name: Anika W.
testimonials.body: Dr. Vasquez changed my life. I had tried three other psychiatrists without success. She correctly identified my treatment-resistant depression, adjusted my protocol, and now I'm functioning at a level I hadn't reached in years.

testimonials.name: Linda K.
testimonials.body: My high-risk pregnancy was managed with extraordinary care by Dr. Laurent and her team. I felt supported at every visit and never waited more than 5 minutes. Delivered a beautiful, healthy boy—couldn't be more grateful.

faqs.question: How do I book an appointment?
faqs.answer: You can book online 24/7 through our Appointments page. Select your service, choose a doctor, pick a date, and your preferred time slot. You'll receive an instant confirmation by email and SMS.

faqs.question: Can I reschedule or cancel my appointment?
faqs.answer: Yes. Log in to the Patient Portal or call our front desk at least 24 hours before your appointment. Last-minute cancellations (within 2 hours) may incur a $50 administrative fee.

faqs.question: What should I bring to my first appointment?
faqs.answer: Please bring a valid government-issued ID, your insurance card, a list of current medications, any relevant medical records or imaging, and completed new-patient intake forms (sent to your email upon booking).

faqs.question: Which insurance plans do you accept?
faqs.answer: We are in-network with Blue Cross Blue Shield, Aetna, United Healthcare, Cigna, and most major PPO plans. Please call our billing team at +1 (555) 234-5679 to verify your specific plan before your visit.

faqs.question: Do you offer self-pay pricing?
faqs.answer: Yes. Our transparent self-pay rates are listed on the Pricing page. We also offer flexible payment plans for larger procedures. No surprise bills—you'll always know the cost before treatment begins.

faqs.question: Are telehealth visits available?
faqs.answer: Yes, many of our doctors offer secure video consultations for follow-ups, medication reviews, and initial assessments. Select 'Telehealth' when booking to see available slots.

faqs.question: How do I access my medical records?
faqs.answer: All records are available in your secure Patient Portal within 24 hours of your visit. To request paper copies, submit a Medical Records Release Form through the portal or at the front desk.

faqs.question: Do you have an on-site pharmacy?
faqs.answer: We partner with CVS Pharmacy on-site (ground floor, Suite 101) for prescription fulfilment. E-prescriptions are sent directly so your medication is ready when you check out.

pricing.notes: Includes vitals, history, physical exam, and care plan.

blog.title: Understanding Your Heart Health: 7 Numbers You Must Know
blog.excerpt: Your heart speaks in numbers — blood pressure, LDL, resting heart rate. Learn what the benchmarks really mean and how to move them in the right direction.
blog.body: Heart disease remains the leading cause of death globally, yet most risk factors are modifiable. In this article, Dr. Williams breaks down the seven key biomarkers every adult should monitor…
blog.author: Dr. Marcus Williams

blog.title: The Definitive Adult Guide to Skin Cancer Prevention
blog.excerpt: Melanoma rates are rising, but the good news is that early detection saves lives. Dr. Patel walks us through what to look for, when to screen, and the sun-protection habits that actually work.
blog.body: Skin cancer is the most common cancer in the United States. Yet it's also one of the most preventable…
blog.author: Dr. Priya Patel

blog.title: 5 Mental Health Myths Your Psychiatrist Wants to Dispel
blog.excerpt: From 'just snap out of it' to 'therapy is only for crisis situations,' Dr. Vasquez confronts the most damaging mental health misconceptions head-on.
blog.body: Stigma about mental health remains one of the biggest barriers to care. Let's tackle the most persistent myths…
blog.author: Dr. Elena Vasquez

careers.title: Registered Nurse – Cardiology
careers.description: Join our Cardiology team as a dedicated RN. You will assist with cardiac procedures, patient education, post-procedure monitoring, and triage.

careers.title: Medical Assistant – Primary Care
careers.description: Support our busy primary care physicians with rooming patients, vital signs, phlebotomy, and administrative tasks.

careers.title: Mental Health Therapist (LMFT/LCSW)
careers.description: Provide individual and group therapy for adults with anxiety, depression, and trauma-related conditions within an integrated care model.
requirements: Active LMFT or LCSW license in California
